mapper.insert: INSERT INTO games (room_id, match_round, black_user_id, white_user_id, total_steps, outcome, runaway_user_id, black_elo_before, white_elo_before, black_elo_after, white_elo_after, black_elo_delta, white_elo_delta, moves_json, black_piece_skin_id, white_piece_skin_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{matchRound}, #{blackUserId}, #{whiteUserId}, #{totalSteps}, #{outcome}, #{runawayUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{blackEloBefore}, #{whiteEloBefore}, #{blackEloAfter}, #{whiteEloAfter}, #{blackEloDelta}, #{whiteEloDelta}, #{movesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{blackPieceSkinId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{whitePieceSkinId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND match_round = #{matchRound}

SELECT id, room_id, match_round, black_user_id, white_user_id, total_steps, outcome, runaway_user_id, black_elo_before, white_elo_before, black_elo_after, white_elo_after, black_elo_delta, white_elo_delta, moves_json, black_piece_skin_id, white_piece_skin_id, created_at AS createdAt FROM games WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND match_round = #{matchRound}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND match_round > #{matchRound}

SELECT id, room_id, match_round, black_user_id, white_user_id, total_steps, outcome, runaway_user_id, black_elo_before, white_elo_before, black_elo_after, white_elo_after, black_elo_delta, white_elo_delta, moves_json, black_piece_skin_id, white_piece_skin_id, created_at AS createdAt FROM games WHERE id = #{id}

choose.when:
SELECT * FROM ( ( SELECT g.id, g.room_id AS roomId, g.match_round AS matchRound, g.total_steps AS totalSteps, g.outcome, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.black_user_id AS blackUserId, g.white_user_id AS whiteUserId, ou.nickname AS opponentNickname, ou.is_bot AS opponentBot, ou.avatar_url AS opponentAvatarUrl, ou.gender AS opponentGender FROM games g INNER JOIN users ou ON ou.id = g.white_user_id WHERE g.black_user_id = #{userId}
AND g.outcome = 'BLACK_WIN'
AND g.outcome = 'WHITE_WIN'
ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) UNION ALL ( SELECT g.id, g.room_id AS roomId, g.match_round AS matchRound, g.total_steps AS totalSteps, g.outcome, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.black_user_id AS blackUserId, g.white_user_id AS whiteUserId, ou.nickname AS opponentNickname, ou.is_bot AS opponentBot, ou.avatar_url AS opponentAvatarUrl, ou.gender AS opponentGender FROM games g INNER JOIN users ou ON ou.id = g.black_user_id WHERE g.white_user_id = #{userId}
AND g.outcome = 'WHITE_WIN'
AND g.outcome = 'BLACK_WIN'
ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) ) h ORDER BY h.createdAt DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET 0
